Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Neighborhood Development is present. Represented by Adbula Dos.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Steven Gay, is present.
Attorney, Aaron Farmer , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ray Erlach, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
